title: Bell Votive Casket
text: A sealed reliquary from the yard's watch chapel, still packed with route tabs and a hooked breach-knife.
flavor: The dead packed for this crossing like they knew no one else would return for them.
resolutionSummary: Cracked open the Bell Votive Casket and recovered a Veil Hook from the watch cache.

effects.text: Bell votive cache opened. The yard watch left breach paths in the lining.
